tasks.title: Pi Touch Display 2 provisioning + dedicated kiosk user + greetd autologin (S7-01, S7-02)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/008-kiosk-pwa-spa-hardening/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/kiosk-pwa-hardening.feature}. SECOND: add Ansible role under deploy/ansible/roles/kiosk/ that (REQ-700) appends dtoverlay lines to /boot/firmware/config.txt + restarts; (REQ-702) creates kiosk user + loginctl enable-linger; (REQ-703) writes /etc/greetd/config.toml; (REQ-729) verifies PSU_MAX_CURRENT=5000 + cmdline.txt sanity per Constitution Article X — abort with descriptive error if not satisfied.

tasks.title: systemd-user kiosk service + Chromium policy lockdown + nightly restart (S7-03, S7-04)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/008-kiosk-pwa-spa-hardening/{requirements.md, design.md}. SECOND: (REQ-704/705/706) systemd user unit at /home/kiosk/.config/systemd/user/meshsat-kiosk.service with Restart=always RestartSec=5 + ExecStartPre polling /healthz. (REQ-707) /etc/chromium/policies/managed/meshsat-lockdown.json + /etc/chromium-browser/... mirror. (REQ-708/709) swayidle config + sudoers.d/kiosk-brightness scoped to backlight path only. (REQ-730) systemd-timer at 03:00 local time restarting the kiosk service.

tasks.title: PWA manifest + service worker + icons + in-SPA OSK (S7-05, S7-06)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/008-kiosk-pwa-spa-hardening/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/kiosk-pwa-hardening.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-710) write web/public/manifest.json with name, icons, display=fullscreen, orientation=landscape, theme colors. (REQ-711) web/public/sw.js providing offline-first shell + network-first API. (REQ-712) /sw/reset unregister endpoint. (REQ-713) icon-192/512/maskable.png. (REQ-714) Hub backend serves files with no-cache on SW. (REQ-715/716) add simple-keyboard npm + web/src/components/MeshSatOSK.vue auto-showing on pointer:coarse + no hw kb + respecting inputmode. Update web/src/main.js to register SW + mount OSK.
tasks.acceptance_test: ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --grep pwa'

tasks.title: SPA fitness — drag-touch widget reorder + tab overflow + modal sizing + virtual keyboard inset (S7-07 to S7-10)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/008-kiosk-pwa-spa-hardening/{requirements.md, design.md}. SECOND: apply 4 SPA fixes per requirements REQ-717..721 to the listed files. Touch handlers mirror the HTML5 drag logic. Tests via Playwright.
tasks.acceptance_test: ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --grep spa-fitness-touch'

tasks.title: SPA fitness — tap-target floor + checkbox rows + responsive grid + input semantics + textarea + focus + pull-to-refresh (S7-11 to S7-16)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/008-kiosk-pwa-spa-hardening/{requirements.md, design.md}. SECOND: apply 6 SPA fixes per REQ-722..728. (REQ-722) h-12 floor on every primary control via a global Tailwind utility. (REQ-723) InterfacesView checkbox row-as-target. (REQ-724) DashboardView grid breakpoint fix. (REQ-725) inputmode + enterkeyhint on every input. (REQ-726) textarea defaults rows=2 + resize-y sm:resize-none. (REQ-727) :focus-visible in style.css. (REQ-728) pull-to-refresh on Inbox + Dashboard.
tasks.acceptance_test: ssh ansible@nllei01androidsdk01 'cd /home/claude-runner/gitlab/products/cubeos/meshsat/web && npm install && npx playwright test --grep spa-fitness-controls'
